pages.text: The $(item)Huge Forest Skyseed$() — a sprawling oak-and-birch landmass, far bigger than a Large island, with a deep, ore-rich body. It may come with a central lake, a river winding across it, or neither — an unbroken sea of trees.$(br2)$(bold)The cost$()$(br)End-game, like all huge seeds: a $(item)Large Forest Skyseed$() ringed between an $(item)Ender Pearl$() and $(item)Blaze Powder$(), packed in dirt — both come from the $(item)Nether$(), so you want it, you farm for it.
The large seed between an ender pearl and blaze powder, packed in dirt.

$(bold)What you get$()$(br)A vast forest to build on — dozens of trees, a thick stone body veined with coal, iron and copper, and (some of the time) a central lake or a winding river. $(br2)Cave systems and the rare buried structure are coming in a later update.
